name: mem0-dream
tagline: Consolidates mem0 memories: merges duplicates, resolves contradictions, prunes stale entries, with a diff-and-confirm gate.
verdict: Well-specified consolidation flow: explicit similarity/confidence thresholds, a diff-and-approve gate, pinned memories always skipped, and a concurrency lock plus dedup check for --auto mode. Gaps: no stated out-of-scope guidance and no version/changelog signal for the skill itself.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' or exclusion guidance anywhere; could misfire on adjacent memory-management requests.
No version field in frontmatter and no changelog/dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
